source_pr.title: ddl, test: delete unstable code that cause test failed in ddl
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #18194

Problem Summary:
`atomic.StoreUint32(&session.SchemaChangedWithoutRetry, 1)`  cause test unstable in ddl

### What is changed and how it works?

change `TestCommitWhenSchemaChange` to `testIntegrationSuite7`


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: PR title: delete unstable code that cause test failed in ddl.
failure_signature: PR title: delete unstable code that cause test failed in ddl.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl, test: delete unstable code that cause test failed in ddl.
fix_pattern: ddl, test: delete unstable code that cause test failed in ddl

evidence: evidence: PR title: delete unstable code that cause test failed in ddl.
evidence: diff moves TestCommitWhenSchemaChange to a different suite and ensures global flag SchemaChangedWithoutRetry is reset via defer, avoiding cross-test interference (ddl/db_partition_test.go).
